content.en:
"Void Beast, do you want to start a war?"

The Six Yang Lord stared at the fifth-order void beast with cold eyes and asked.

The fifth-order void beast spoke, and its voice resounded through this void area.

"Yes, you Eternal Realm have invaded the Abyssal Land, the Abyssal Land is a lair of our Void Beast, and invading the Abyss Land is tantamount to declaring war on our Void Beast. "

The momentum of the fifth-order void beasts was so strong that they didn't seem to be afraid of the eternal realms of the space-time territory at all, and they seemed to have forgotten that they had been driven to the depths of the void region.

"It seems that you Void Beasts are very confident in your own strength this time, but just you are a fifth-order Void Beast, and you can't compete with our Lord Alliance. Lord Liuyang sneered.

"Then add a few more!"

Bang!!!!

One after another, fifth-order Void Beasts appeared, and a large number of Void Beasts also appeared around.

"So much!"

The faces of the Six Yang Lords were heavy.

At the beginning, the Lords Alliance took action to drive the Void Beast out of this area, so that countless space-time territories could connect and communicate freely.

Otherwise, there will be Void Beasts wandering in the Void area outside the space-time territory, and the space-time passage will not be able to be opened, and it will be destroyed by the Void Beast if you are not careful.

And in that battle, the number of Void Beasts was not too many, and it was only a fifth-order Void Beast.

But now, how could so many fifth-order void beasts be born.

"Could it be that these are the Void Beasts deep in the Void Zone, and they are allied?"

Lord Liuyang guessed.

If that's the case, then it's not surprising.

After all, no one knows how many Void Beasts there are in the depths of the Void Zone.

If the Void Beast is divided into one faction, then the Void Beast outside the space-time territory belonged to one force before, but now it is a joint invasion of multiple Void Beast forces.

They are afraid that they have wanted to invade for a long time, and they have not determined the time, and this incident in the Abyss Land directly made them decide to make a move.

"Since you want war, let's do it!"

The Lord of the Six Suns said fearlessly.

This time, the Void Beast mobilized a total of seven fifth-order Void Beasts in an attempt to break through the Lord Alliance's many space-time territories at once.

Immediately, they struck.

The Lords of the Six Suns retreated while fighting, and those Immortal Realm Lords also retreated quickly.

Soon, the Lord of the Six Suns was injured.

After all, one against seven, he is naturally not an opponent.

At this moment, one of the six presidents of the Lords Alliance, another legendary lord, Aurora Leader, appeared. Hum !

The golden light tore through the time and space of the void area, and directly bombarded a fifth-order void beast, even if the fifth-order void beast could completely void its body, there was no tide between heaven and earth.

However, the Aurora Lord's attack could reach the level of distorting nothingness, so it hit this fifth-order void beast and directly blasted it away.

But even so, there was no way to severely damage the fifth-order Void Beast.

At the beginning, the six legendary lords besieged a fifth-order void beast, but they couldn't kill it, so they could only severely damage it and let it escape.

Time passed slowly, and the battlefield defense line was pulled to a void area closer to the space-time territory, and a large number of Eternal Realms participated in the war under the orders of the Lord Alliance, and some Eight Extremes Realms were also forced to participate.

As for the existence of weaker disease, there is no need to participate, otherwise if you enter the void area, you won't be able to stay for long, and you won't even have the qualifications to become cannon fodder.

For this war, Ye Tian was the happiest, because he could copy the immortal ancestral endowments of many void beasts.

As a result, he often participated in wars, and with the degree of his life, the copy body only fell once, and the others returned safely, and brought back a large number of immortal ancestral endowments.

Ye Tian didn't know when this war would end, so he had to copy enough of the Immortal Ancestral Endowment to easily fuse into a talent that surpassed the Immortal Ancestral Endowment.

this day.

Ye Tianyi's copied body began to fuse with those copied immortal ancestral endowments, and the first fusion was the Void Ancestral Endowment, this immortal ancestral endowment was very terrifying, and it was definitely Ye Tian's most awesome life-saving talent at present.

Therefore, he naturally attaches great importance to it.

As the Void Alien Talent of a Gate was fused, the power of this Immortal Ancestor became more and more powerful.

It still took a bit of time to fuse the Immortal Ancestral Fu, and even if he accelerated the time, he couldn't fuse these Immortal Ancestral Fufu to a higher level in a short period of time.

After a long time, the war has changed dramatically, and after Ye Tian's fusion, the Void Talent finally ushered in a qualitative change.

Rumble!!!!

The Void Talent has metamorphosed, turning into a talent that surpasses the Immortal Ancestral Endowment.

"Legendary Ancestral Fu!"

This is a talent that surpasses the Immortal Ancestral Fu, and it is much stronger than the Immortal Ancestral Fu.

Ye Tian found that he only used the Legendary Ancestral Endowment Level Void Talent, and it would be difficult for the Immortal Realm Lords to hurt him.

If he created a corresponding eternal technique and developed the ability of the void talent to the extreme, then such an eternal technique would be enough for him not to be afraid of the attack of the Immortal Realm Lord when facing the Lord of the Immortal Realm.

"The legendary ancestor is too powerful!"

Ye Tian exclaimed.

Immediately, he continued to fuse with other Immortal Ancestors.

For example, the power of the Immortal Ancestor, every Void Beast is also addicted, so he has also copied a lot.

In the following days, Ye Tian fused the Legendary Power Ancestor, the Legendary Defense Ancestor, and the Legendary Speed Ancestor, and the birth of these Legendary Ancestors made Ye Tianyi's strength increase a little.

What's more, his potential has increased considerably.

Moreover, the Legendary Ancestor can hopefully create the Legendary Eternal Technique.

Eternal skills are divided into ordinary eternal skills, top eternal skills and legendary eternal skills, it is said that only the legendary lords have the hope of creating the legendary eternal (Li Zhao Hao) skills, and if Ye Tian creates the legendary eternal skills, his strength will definitely improve a lot, and he will even directly reach the second boundary barrier.

Of course, it takes a long time for him to create, and he can't create it all at once.

this day.

The war between the space-time territory and the Void Beast has taken a new turn, and the top of the Lords Alliance has held a meeting to prepare to deal a heavy blow to the Void Beast in one fell swoop.

And the lowest Eternal Realm participating in this meeting is the Immortal Realm, and the highest is the six Legendary Lords.

Of course.

They do not participate in the meeting as the ontology, but as the embodiment of the mind, so that it does not affect the battle.

Lord of the Six Suns.

Aurora Lord Voice!

Lord of the Holy Peak!

Lord of the Wilderness!

Lord of the Mist!

Lord of Ice!

The six Legendary Lords and nearly a hundred Immortal Realm Lords all gathered here.

The meeting has begun!_
